description: Compact LLM-readable catalog for generated microservices.sh projects. Read the referenced Markdown docs before modifying modules.

agentGuidance.sourceOwnershipDefault: user-owned repository with branch/PR or patch workflow

modules.name: Auth
modules.summary: EdDSA service-token mint/verify, scope checks, and JWKS for auth-gated inter-service communication.

modules.name: Identity
modules.summary: Passwordless email-code login and server-side sessions, built on auth. Bridges authenticated user sessions to short-lived scoped service tokens.

modules.name: Gateway
modules.summary: Public trust boundary: API-key authentication, rate limiting, scope narrowing, and token exchange via auth.

modules.name: Customer
modules.summary: Customer profiles, tags, lifecycle state, consent fields, and customer events.

modules.name: Org, Team & RBAC
modules.summary: Multi-tenant organizations, memberships, roles, and invitations with permission resolution for tenant-scoped B2B applications.

modules.name: Admin Shell
modules.summary: Schema-driven admin CRUD over host D1 tables with a resource registry, RBAC checks, soft-delete, search, pagination, and audit hooks.

modules.name: File & Media
modules.summary: R2-backed file uploads with tenant-scoped keys, upload tickets, owner-scoped listing, orphan cleanup, soft-deletes, and async variant hooks.

modules.name: Jobs & Workflows
modules.summary: Durable background jobs and deterministic workflows with typed step dispatch, waiting/resume gates, retries, schedules, artifacts, and dead-letter handling.

modules.name: In-App Notifications
modules.summary: Per-user in-app notification feed with user-scoped list/count reads, read/unread state, typed payloads, reconnect catch-up, and deduplicated delivery.

modules.name: Support Ticket
modules.summary: Tenant-scoped support tickets with sequence numbers, lifecycle state, priority, assignment, comments, attachments, and public follow-up links.

modules.name: Ads Manager
modules.summary: Cross-platform ad monitoring over an upstream ads service with D1 insight snapshots, anomaly alerts, normalized campaign views, and entitlement-gated connector access.

modules.name: Billing & Subscriptions
modules.summary: Recurring plans and subscription state on top of Stripe with a status state machine, idempotent webhook application, plan changes, metered usage, and dunning hooks.

modules.name: Forms & Intake
modules.summary: Dynamic form builder and intake with serializable field schemas, validation rules, conditional visibility, idempotent submissions, Turnstile support, and attachment references.

modules.name: Image Generation
modules.summary: Text-to-image generation and editing across pluggable providers with R2-backed image bytes, tenant-scoped keys, D1 gallery metadata, and provider fallback.

modules.name: Invoice
modules.summary: Invoices with gapless atomic numbering, per-line tax, recurring invoice templates, draft-open-paid-void lifecycle, idempotent payments, payment links, and dunning hooks.

modules.name: Membership Credits
modules.summary: Tenant-scoped membership tiers, active customer memberships, customer credit balances, credit ledger transactions, and membership history.

modules.name: Operator Work
modules.summary: Agent-readable task board, focus plan, daily review, and auditable operator work state for DOT AI OS.

modules.name: Project Progress
modules.summary: Project progress timeline, worker access grants, media metadata, comments, and public customer snapshots.

modules.name: SMS Campaigns
modules.summary: Tenant-scoped SMS campaigns for opted-in contacts, groups, reusable templates, provider configuration, scheduled sends, dispatch, and delivery callbacks.

modules.name: Storage Entitlements
modules.summary: Storage quota, packages, purchases, owner usage accounting, and share-link entitlement controls for portal-style applications.

modules.name: Support Inbox
modules.summary: Tenant-scoped support widget and inbox for widget settings, quick actions, conversations, messages, channel metadata, and agent takeover.

modules.name: Product Catalog
modules.summary: Product and category catalog with SKU uniqueness, external mappings, combo products, and catalog events.

modules.name: Inventory
modules.summary: Tenant-scoped inventory ledger with stock movements, reservations, deductions, reconciliation, and derived balances.

modules.name: Sales Order
modules.summary: Tenant-scoped sales orders with line items, external references, status transitions, reservation handoff, and invoice draft handoff.

modules.name: Estimate Quote
modules.summary: Estimate and quote documents with draft editing, lifecycle transitions, accepted conversion, and invoice draft handoff.

modules.name: Recurring Documents
modules.summary: Recurring invoice and bill templates with due-cycle generation, lifecycle state, and draft document handoff.

modules.name: Knowledge Base RAG
modules.summary: Tenant-scoped knowledge articles, source records, attachment references, active-only search, and cite-or-refuse grounded answers for support workflows.

modules.name: Shipment
modules.summary: Shipment batches and fulfillment workflow with idempotent completion and shipment events.

modules.name: Commerce Sync
modules.summary: Provider-neutral commerce connections, mappings, sync runs, webhook receipts, and normalized payload envelopes.

modules.name: Accounting Core
modules.summary: Tenant-scoped double-entry accounting foundation with chart of accounts, fiscal periods, balanced posting, voiding, and trial balance.

modules.name: Accounts Payable
modules.summary: Tenant-scoped accounts payable with vendors, bills, payable lifecycle, idempotent payment application, aging, recurring bill templates, and accounting-core handoff ports.

modules.name: Accounts Receivable
modules.summary: Tenant-scoped customer payment application, open receivables, aging, and statement workflows.

modules.name: Bank Reconciliation
modules.summary: Tenant-scoped bank accounts, statement imports, matching, and reconciliation completion with integer-cent balances.

modules.name: Booking
modules.summary: Service booking, availability, cancellation windows, confirmation, and booking events.

modules.name: Audit Log
modules.summary: Append-only audit trail. Pure event sink: records domain events from a signed queue or direct calls.

modules.name: Payment
modules.summary: Stripe-backed payment provider: create payment intents, record payments, and verify signed Stripe webhooks. Emits payment lifecycle events.

modules.name: Marketing Research
modules.summary: Composable, cited marketing research: pull external demand, competitive, and community signals through swappable ports, snapshot over time, and produce cite-or-refuse marketing briefs (no fake proof). v0 covers community listening + cited synthesis.

modules.name: Webhook Delivery
modules.summary: Outbound mirror of the event bus: registers external endpoints (per-endpoint signing secret), delivers HMAC-signed domain events, and logs delivery attempts.

modules.name: Idempotency
modules.summary: Scoped idempotency records for safe retry, replay, and duplicate side-effect prevention.

modules.name: Email
modules.summary: Transactional email module with provider-neutral ports and Resend and StackSuite (AWS SES) HTTP adapters.
